title: Bulk upload to Smart Capture
summaryBody: We’d require API support for this prior to implementation which is probably unlikely due to Workflow capacity. Plus from 2025 strategy chats with Craig we may moreso be wanting to focus on increasing visibility of SC etc. rather than taking this piece of work on
